case_title: LISA-ANNE I. LEE VS. IFEOLUWA SARAH FESOJAYE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-13-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-13-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF LISA-ANNE I. LEE IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS JOEL SANCHEZ (DOMESTIC PARTNER). DEFENDANT IFEOLUWA SARAH FESOJAYE IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DEEMS THE FILED PROOF OF SERVICES IS VALID. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED AUG-19-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FESOJAYE, IFEOLUWA SARAH
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE TEMPORARY JUDGE FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, LISA-ANNE I.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,794.61 FILED BY LEE, LISA-ANNE I. AS TO DEFENDANT FESOJAYE, IFEOLUWA SARAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-13-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, LISA-ANNE I. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FESOJAYE, IFEOLUWA SARAH $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,550.00, FOR COSTS ASSOCIATED WITH END OF TENANCY AND EMOTIONAL DISTRESS FROM MOVE-OUT. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR TO DEFEND. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-13-2022 - JUDGMENT.
